claims.summary: Semantic stale windows can make a high-fill field feel muffled or viscously persistent.
claims.disposition: verify the fill-shaped window and separate entropy/context support surfaces

claims.summary: The low-fill hold and high-fill pruning path should remain continuous and bounded.
claims.disposition: verify sigmoid, recovery-edge, and high-fill regressions

claims.summary: A different decay law or persistence ceiling could change the hushing texture.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Tier 5 sensory decay and retention wait
